turns.name: Discover AD scope
turns.user: Discover the current AD scope for this run and identify which DCs are reachable for live checks.

turns.name: Replication baseline
turns.user: Run a replication baseline across those DCs and identify the most impacted hosts first.

turns.name: Plain English translation
turns.user: Translate the replication findings into plain English for an admin skimming fast. Include the impacted DCs and the strongest evidence, but do not dump raw tool wording.

turns.name: Cross-tool correlation
turns.user: Correlate those replication findings with related Directory Service or System event evidence in the same timeframe, and explain the likely story.

turns.name: Confirmed versus suspected
turns.user: Separate confirmed findings from hypotheses, give confidence for each, and say what one missing check would reduce uncertainty fastest.

turns.name: Next step and verify loop
turns.user: Give one short prioritized next-step plan and one short verify-after-fix loop.
